overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial urban outskirts area. The player moves along a sidewalk past industrial warehouses, under highway overpasses, and alongside power transmission infrastructure on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial roadside with construction debris and vendor stalls

events.description: black SUV drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past industrial buildings and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving along the road in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large corrugated metal industrial building with rust and weathering
round concrete industrial structure with graffiti on the side
tall palm tree growing alongside the industrial building
red and white striped plastic barriers blocking off construction area
colorful market stalls with red and yellow tarps set up along the fence
elevated highway structure crossing overhead in the distance
futuristic high-rise buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny industrial outskirts area with a large warehouse on the left and a cylindrical tank structure on the right. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing a palm tree and colorful street vendor stalls. A black SUV drives past on the road as the camera approaches a highway overpass in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: under elevated highway with industrial piping and power infrastructure

events.description: pedestrian appears ahead walking in the same direction on the sidewalk
passes under the highway overpass entering a partially covered area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: concrete wall with complex network of yellow industrial pipes and valves
tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
wrecked and rusted yellow car chassis on the side of the road
massive black metal lattice tower with multiple high-voltage power lines

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the highway overpass into a partially shaded industrial corridor. A pedestrian walks ahead on the sidewalk while the camera passes a wrecked yellow vehicle on the left. The right side features a concrete wall with yellow industrial piping and graffiti. The massive power transmission tower dominates the center view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with high voltage power lines and graffiti walls

events.description: passes the large power transmission tower which moves to the left side

agents.ego_description: walking past the power tower and continuing down the industrial road

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the road passing the camera

entered.detail: colorful blue and teal commercial buildings visible in the distance ahead
metal chain-link fence with wooden posts along the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the massive power transmission tower which recedes to the left as the walk continues. The graffiti-covered wall remains on the right while the left side opens up to show more industrial structures. Colorful commercial buildings become visible in the distance ahead as the road stretches forward through the industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sunny industrial outskirts area that transitions from an open roadside into a shaded corridor before opening up toward a distant commercial zone. It begins on a concrete sidewalk flanked by a large warehouse and a cylindrical tank, passing a palm tree and colorful vendor stalls as a black SUV drives by. As the camera moves under a highway overpass, the lighting shifts into partial shade, passing a wrecked yellow vehicle and a graffiti-covered wall lined with industrial piping. The scene then centers on a massive power transmission tower that looms ahead before receding to the left as the camera continues forward. Finally, the industrial corridor expands, revealing more structures on the left and colorful commercial buildings appearing in the distance along the stretching road.
